case_title: KARINA TREVINO VS. JUAN MANUEL MONTES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TREVINO, KARINA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, JUAN MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA CILANTRO MEXICAN RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TREVINO, KARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTES, JUAN MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA CILANTRO MEXICAN RESTAURANT $4,708.74 PRINCIPAL, $89.16 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,997.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
